name: image_generate_ultra
description: Generate ultra-quality images from text prompts using Stability AI's most advanced model powered by Stable Diffusion 3.5. Supports optional image input for image-to-image generation.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Text description of the desired image.

parameters.name: negative_prompt
parameters.description: Text describing what to exclude from the image.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: Optional input image for image-to-image generation.

parameters.name: strength
parameters.description: Transformation strength when using input image (0.0-1.0).

request_example.body: multipart/form-data: prompt='A serene Japanese garden at sunset with cherry blossoms'&aspect_ratio=16:9&output_format=png
